hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | tr -d "\n"); BLOCKED=""; echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "rm -rf /|DROP DATABASE|DROP TABLE|git push --force|chmod 777|truncate" && BLOCKED="危险命令被拦截: $CMD"; if [ -n "$BLOCKED" ]; then echo "[PreToolUse BLOCK] $BLOCKED" >&2; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.java ]]; then cd E:/learnspace/harnesslearn/backend && mvn compile -q 2>/dev/null && echo "[OK] Java 编译成功" || echo "[FAIL] Java 编译失败，请检查代码"; fi'

bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(vue|ts|tsx|js)$ ]]; then cd E:/learnspace/harnesslearn/frontend && npm run type-check 2>/dev/null && echo "[OK] TypeScript 类型检查通过" || echo "[WARN] TypeScript 类型检查失败"; fi'
bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | tr -d "\n"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "mvn test|npm run test|pytest|vitest"; then echo "[循环反馈] 测试已运行，请检查结果是否满足 DoD（覆盖率 ≥ 80%）"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "
========================================"; echo "[质量门禁] 会话结束检查"; echo "========================================"; ROOT=E:/learnspace/harnesslearn; PASS=true; echo "
--- Java 编译检查 ---"; if [ -d $ROOT/backend ]; then cd $ROOT/backend && mvn compile -q 2>/dev/null && echo "[OK] 编译成功" || { echo "[FAIL] 编译失败"; PASS=false; }; else echo "[SKIP] 后端目录不存在"; fi; echo "
--- DoD 提醒 ---"; echo "请确认已核对 docs/definition-of-done.md 对应清单"; echo "请确认已更新 docs/task-list.md 任务状态"; echo "请确认已更新 CHANGELOG.md"; echo "
--- 代码质量检查 ---"; echo "1. 所有测试通过"; echo "2. 测试覆盖率 ≥ 80%"; echo "3. Lint 零错误"; echo "4. 类型检查通过"; echo "5. Code Review 通过"; echo "
========================================"; $PASS && echo "✓ 质量门禁通过" || echo "✗ 质量门禁未通过，请修复后再提交"; echo "========================================"'
